characters.name: 3rd Grade Female Aardvark (Number 3)
characters.description: 3rd Grade Female Aardvarkis an unnamed third grader who made her debut in the episode "Desk Wars." In the episode, she was part of a group of four students that were inMr. Ratburn's class. She and the other three students didn't get involved with the mishaps that took place within the class until most of the kids started breaking into, damaging, or in some cases destroying each other's desks and possessions later on in the episode. After "Desk Wars," she reappeared once more in the episode "Desert Island Dish" in Mr. Ratburn's class once again. She has not reappeared since.

characters.name: 3rd Grade Male Dog
characters.description: 3rd Grade Male Dogis an unnamed third grader who made his debut in the episode "Arthur's Eyes". In the episode he was seen at lunch along with several other characters including the main characters themselves. He is seen in the background of the episodes, but has been heard speaking in a few episodes such as "Arthur's Substitute Teacher Trouble". He is also seen in "A is for Angry" carrying a camera and filming the chess match betweenArthurandBrain. He may have some interest in videography. Not much is known about his personality, as he is a background character and does not speak much, but he appears to be friendly and hangs out with the other kids. He plays the tuba in theLakewood Elementary Band, and may have some interest in videography since he was seen filming the chess match between Arthur and Brain in"A" is for Angry. However, Muffy may have forced him to do the latter.
